allow:
Bash(bash << 'GAME'
exec 3<>/dev/tcp/localhost/4000

sleep 1

# Login sequence
echo "dummy" >&3
sleep 0.5

echo "yes" >&3  # Confirm the name
sleep 0.5

echo "helloworld" >&3
sleep 0.5

echo "yes" >&3  # Confirm password or whatever it's asking
sleep 0.5

# Now we should be in
echo "look" >&3
sleep 0.8

# Now let's search for bakery by exploring systematically
# Start with exits
echo "exits" >&3
sleep 0.5

# Try moving to different rooms
ATTEMPTS=0
while [ $ATTEMPTS -lt 25 ]; do
    # Get current room info
    echo "look" >&3
    sleep 0.4
    
    # Parse the output to see if we find bakery
    OUTPUT=$\(timeout 1 cat <&3 2>/dev/null\)
    echo "$OUTPUT" | head -20
    
    if echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -qi "bakery\\|granite\\|baker"; then
        echo ""
        echo "!!! FOUND THE BAKERY !!!"
        sleep 0.5
        
        # List the menu
        echo "list" >&3
        sleep 1
        timeout 2 cat <&3 | head -50
        break
    fi
    
    # Try a random direction
    DIRS=\("north" "south" "east" "west" "up" "down"\)
    DIR=${DIRS[$\(\(RANDOM % 6\)\)]}
    echo "$DIR" >&3
    sleep 0.5
    
    ATTEMPTS=$\(\(ATTEMPTS + 1\)\)
done

exec 3>&-
GAME)

Bash(bash << 'GAME'
exec 3<>/dev/tcp/localhost/4000

# Wait for greeting
sleep 1

# Send name: "dummy"
printf "dummy\\n" >&3
sleep 0.8

# This should ask for password, not confirmation
# Read the prompt
PROMPT=$\(timeout 1 dd if=/proc/self/fd/3 bs=1 count=200 2>/dev/null\)
echo "GOT PROMPT:" 
echo "$PROMPT"

# Send password if prompted, or 'y' if asked for confirmation
if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -q "Did I get that right"; then
    echo "Sending Y to confirm dummy"
    printf "y\\n" >&3
    sleep 0.8
    
    # Now should ask for password
    printf "helloworld\\n" >&3
else
    echo "Sending password directly"
    printf "helloworld\\n" >&3
fi

sleep 1

# Now try to explore
echo ""
echo "=== Looking around ==="
printf "look\\n" >&3
sleep 0.8
timeout 2 cat <&3 | head -60

# Try to navigate
for i in {1..15}; do
    DIRS=\("north" "south" "east" "west" "northeast" "northwest" "southeast" "southwest"\)
    DIR=${DIRS[$\(\(RANDOM % 8\)\)]}
    
    printf "$DIR\\n" >&3
    sleep 0.5
    
    OUTPUT=$\(timeout 1 cat <&3 | head -40\)
    
    if echo "$OUTPUT" | grep -qi "bakery\\|baker\\|granite"; then
        echo ""
        echo "!!! FOUND BAKERY !!!"
        echo "$OUTPUT"
        
        sleep 0.5
        printf "list\\n" >&3
        sleep 1
        timeout 2 cat <&3 | head -80
        break
    fi
done

exec 3>&-
GAME)

Bash(bash << 'EOF'
\(
sleep 2
echo "dummy"
sleep 1  
echo "y"
sleep 1
echo "helloworld"
sleep 2
echo "look"
sleep 1
echo "exits"
sleep 1
for i in {1..20}; do
  echo "north"
  sleep 0.6
  echo "look"
  sleep 0.6
done
\) | telnet localhost 4000 2>&1 | tee /tmp/gameplay.log | grep -A 3 -B 3 "bakery\\|baker\\|Granite"
EOF)
